parameters.url: ={{ (() => { const c = $('Config critères (défaut)').first().json; const minB = Math.max(0, (c.pieces_min || 2) - 1); const maxB = Math.max(0, (c.pieces_max || 3) - 1); let beds = ''; for (let i = minB; i <= maxB; i++) beds += '&nbBedrooms%5B%5D=' + i; return 'https://www.giboire.com/recherche-location/appartement_maison/?searchBy=default&address%5B%5D=35&priceMax=' + (c.prix_max_cc || 700) + '&livingSurfaceMin=' + (c.surface_min_m2 || 35) + '&livingSurfaceMax=' + (c.surface_max_m2 || 75) + beds + '&transactionType%5B%5D=Location&searchBy=default'; })() }}
